title: Saudi Arabian Portobello Mushroom Kebabs with Chinese Twist
description: A fusion of flavors, combining the juiciness of portobello mushrooms with the spices of Saudi Arabian cuisine, all wrapped in a Chinese-inspired kebab.
instructions: Preheat grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together piquant sauce and Saudi Arabian kebab spice mix.
Thread mushrooms, bell pepper, and pita bread onto skewers.
Brush kebabs with vegetable oil and season with piquant sauce mixture.
Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until mushrooms are tender.
Warm or toast pita bread and serve with grilled kebabs.
